# Issue Template — Bug

```markdown
## Summary
<one-sentence description>

## Reproduction
1. <step>
2. <step>
3. <observed>

## Expected
<...>

## Actual
<...>

## Environment
- App version / commit:
- Browser / OS:
- Network / auth state:

## Evidence
- logs: <path>
- screenshots: <path>
- record: <path>

## Probable Surface
- Frontend:
- Backend:
- Database:
- Infra:

## Severity
- Blocker / High / Medium / Low / Cosmetic

## Owner
@<owner>
```
